message:
fix: Add more runtime exports for generated code

Export additional types and functions needed by codegen:
- BytecodeProgram from Python/compile.zig
- test_support from Lib/test/support.zig
- boolBuiltinCall and int__new__ from runtime/type_builtins.zig
- formatInt from runtime/format_ops.zig
- PyComplex from Objects/complexobject.zig

Note: There are still missing exports (BytecodeVM, os_helper, etc.)
that were likely broken by previous refactoring efforts.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
